entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: The primary cereal crop studied for yield and nutrient content

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop used in a sequential cropping system with maize

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop used in an intercropping system with maize

entities.name: MINIMUM TILLAGE
entities.description: A tillage practice aimed at reducing soil disturbance

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL TILLAGE
entities.description: A standard tillage practice used for comparison

entities.name: RESIDUE ADDITION
entities.description: The practice of adding crop residues back into the soil

entities.name: NO-RESIDUE ADDITION
entities.description: The practice of removing or not adding crop residues to the soil

entities.name: MAIZE-CHICKPEA SEQUENTIAL CROPPING
entities.description: A cropping system where maize and chickpea are grown in sequence

entities.name: MAIZE-PIGEONPEA INTERCROPPING
entities.description: A cropping system where maize and pigeonpea are grown simultaneously

entities.name: BROAD-BEDS AND FURROWS
entities.description: A field layout technique used in the experiment

entities.name: SPLIT-SPLIT DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental design used to organize the field trials

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: EQUIVALENT YIELD
entities.description: A calculated yield metric used to compare different cropping systems

entities.name: SYSTEM PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The overall productivity of the cropping system

entities.name: NUTRIENT CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of nutrients within the crop

entities.name: STOVER NITROGEN CONTENT
entities.description: The nitrogen level found in the maize stover

entities.name: RAINFED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Agricultural conditions relying solely on rainfall for moisture

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The climatic region characterized by low and irregular rainfall

entities.name: KHARIF
entities.description: The monsoon cropping season

entities.name: RABI
entities.description: The winter cropping season

entities.name: HYDERABAD
entities.description: The city in India where the research was conducted

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE FOOD AND NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The overarching goal of improving long-term food and nutrient availability
